Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 412 upvotes, 52 comments
  2. Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means 62 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 223 upvotes, 35 comments
  4. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 44 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. The Reason Windows Hate Is Exploding: It's the End of Personal Computing [video] 21 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Drawvg Filter for FFmpeg 98 upvotes, 18 comments
  7. Video Encoding and Decoding with Vulkan Compute Shaders in FFmpeg 17 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. Full Disclosure: A Third (and Fourth) Azure Sign-In Log Bypass Found 190 upvotes, 52 comments
  9. Just Put It on a Map 29 upvotes, 4 comments
  10. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 210 upvotes, 60 comments
  11. ArXiv Declares Independence from Cornell 412 upvotes, 131 comments
  12. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 467 upvotes, 163 comments
  13. Building a Reader for the Smallest Hard Drive 60 upvotes, 15 comments
  14. The Soul of a Pedicab Driver 54 upvotes, 13 comments
  15. Drugwars for the TI-82/83/83 Calculators (2011) 181 upvotes, 60 comments
  16. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 199 upvotes, 83 comments
  17. Cursor Composer 2 is just Kimi K2.5 with RL 140 upvotes, 61 comments
  18. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 142 upvotes, 66 comments
  19. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 270 upvotes, 138 comments
  20. FSF statement on copyright infringement lawsuit Bartz v. Anthropic 142 upvotes, 68 comments
  21. Astral to Join OpenAI 1399 upvotes, 854 comments
  22. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce 128 upvotes, 63 comments
  23. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 284 upvotes, 160 comments
  24. Push events into a running session with channels 358 upvotes, 211 comments
  25. Delphi 13.1 Released, with ARM64 support 18 upvotes, 5 comments
  26. Too Much Color 45 upvotes, 24 comments
  27. A Journey Through Infertility 51 upvotes, 36 comments
  28. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 940 upvotes, 1011 comments
  29. Show HN: Sonar – A tiny CLI to see and kill whatever's running on localhost 15 upvotes, 12 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 408 upvotes, 728 comments

Last generated 9:00pm, 20 March 2026. Source here.
